properties.name: Tunnel Tiergarten Spreebogen / B96
properties.source: Public tunnel portal coordinates and route description; approximate centreline for visual QA
properties.render_cues: Draw as a visible under-surface tunnel tube with warm lighting dots and ventilation / shaft markers at portals and key service points.
properties.notes: Approximate visual centreline from Minna-Cauer-Strasse / Invalidenstrasse through Hauptbahnhof, under the Spree and Tiergarten to Kemperplatz, with southern continuation outside v0.1 visible bounds.
